name: Whole Wheat Irish Soda Bread (Large Loaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the temperature specified in your bread machine's manual.
2. In a large bowl, combine the bread flour, whole wheat flour, salt, and baking soda. Stir until well mixed.
3. Add the butter, raisins, and caraway seeds to the dry ingredients. Mix until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Pour in the buttermilk and yeast. Stir with a fork or your hands until a shaggy dough forms.
5. Transfer the dough to a Panasonic bread machine set on the "Whole Wheat Bread" setting.
6. Cook according to the machine's instructions, then let it cool on a wire rack.
7. Turn off the heat when the bread is done baking.
